{"id":"gt-ko7","title":"Fix show.go bd-show exec for Windows","description":"internal/cmd/show.go line 79 uses syscall.Exec to exec bd show. Needs the same Windows treatment: os/exec.Command().Run() with stdio passthrough on Windows, syscall.Exec on Unix. Create show_windows.go and show_unix.go or integrate into the helpers platform split.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T04:18:49Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-24T04:18:49Z"}

Replace syscall.Exec which is Unix-only. old_value: {"id":"gt-8mf","title":"Add SetProcessGroup to git.run() and git.runWithEnv() central runners","description":"git/git.go lines 93 and 115: the central run() and runWithEnv() methods create exec.Command without calling util.SetProcessGroup(cmd). ALL Git struct method calls flow through these two functions. Fix: add 'util.SetProcessGroup(cmd)' after each exec.Command call. git.go does not currently import util — need to add import. No circular dependency risk (util doesn't import git). This single fix cascades to ~25+ call sites.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:11Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:11Z"}

{"id":"gt-62h","title":"Add SetProcessGroup to all exec.Command calls in daemon/ package","description":"daemon/ package has ~35 standalone exec.Command calls in background context without SetProcessGroup. These run on daemon tick loops and cause rapid window flashing. Files and key lines:
- lifecycle.go: lines 43, 634, 656, 674, 699, 718, 758, 796, 864, 955, 962, 1132, 1255 (mail send, git fetch/pull/stash, bd show/list)
- checkpoint_dog.go: line 164 (git commands)
- dog_molecule.go: line 278 (bd commands)
- dolt_backup.go: lines 114, 149, 191 (dolt backup)
- dolt_remotes.go: lines 149, 174, 228, 247, 266 (dolt sql)
- jsonl_git_backup.go: lines 300, 308, 417, 426, 440, 460, 538 (git/dolt/gt commands)
- main_branch_test_runner.go: lines 212, 221, 228, 236, 268 (git worktree)
- scheduled_maintenance.go: line 205 (gt maintain)
- wisp_reaper.go: line 129 (gt commands)
- pressure_darwin.go: lines 11, 32, 48 (sysctl/vm_stat — darwin only, low priority)
Fix: add util.SetProcessGroup(cmd) after each exec.Command call.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:36Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:36Z"}

daemon/ package has ~35 standalone exec.Command calls in background context without SetProcessGroup. These run on daemon tick loops and cause rapid window flashing. Files and key lines:
- lifecycle.go: lines 43, 634, 656, 674, 699, 718, 758, 796, 864, 955, 962, 1132, 1255 (mail send, git fetch/pull/stash, bd show/list)
- checkpoint_dog.go: line 164 (git commands)
- dog_molecule.go: line 278 (bd commands)
- dolt_backup.go: lines 114, 149, 191 (dolt backup)
- dolt_remotes.go: lines 149, 174, 228, 247, 266 (dolt sql)
- jsonl_git_backup.go: lines 300, 308, 417, 426, 440, 460, 538 (git/dolt/gt commands)
- main_branch_test_runner.go: lines 212, 221, 228, 236, 268 (git worktree)
- scheduled_maintenance.go: line 205 (gt maintain)
- wisp_reaper.go: line 129 (gt commands)
- pressure_darwin.go: lines 11, 32, 48 (sysctl/vm_stat — darwin only, low priority)
Fix: add util.SetProcessGroup(cmd) after each exec.Command call."}

{"id":"gt-xqz","title":"Add SetProcessGroup to standalone git exec.Command calls in git/git.go","description":"git/git.go has ~20 standalone exec.Command('git',...) calls outside the central run()/runWithEnv() methods. These are package-level functions like Clone (line 215), runMergeCheck (line 877), InitSubmodules (line 1805), InitSparseCheckout (line 1818), etc. Each needs util.SetProcessGroup(cmd) after exec.Command. Full list of lines: 215, 322, 353, 367, 372, 383, 391, 877, 1195, 1206, 1215, 1805, 1818, 1826, 1921, 1949, 1972, 1989, 2003, 2011.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:11Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:11Z"}

{"id":"gt-h4b","title":"Add SetProcessGroup to all exec.Command calls in doltserver/ package","description":"doltserver/ has ~25 standalone exec.Command calls. The dolt server runs continuously in background.
- doltserver.go: lines 80, 90, 106, 124, 125, 411, 723, 735, 767, 860, 876, 1109, 1525, 1619, 1658, 2176, 3155, 3504, 3514 (dolt/git/lsof/ps/robocopy/cp commands)
- dolthub.go: line 111 (dolt remote add)
- sync.go: lines 53, 90, 97, 121, 445 (dolt/bd commands)
- wisps_migrate.go: lines 120, 131, 142 (bd sql)
Note: doltserver already has sysproc_windows.go with setProcessGroup() for the server start. But many other dolt/bd exec.Command calls in the same package don't use it.
Fix: add util.SetProcessGroup(cmd) or the local setProcessGroup(cmd) after each exec.Command call.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:36Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-24T21:27:36Z"}

- wisps_migrate.go: lines 120, 131, 142 (bd sql)
Note: doltserver already has sysproc_windows.go with setProcessGroup() for the server start. But many other dolt/bd exec.Command calls in the same package don't use it.
Fix: add util.SetProcessGroup(cmd) or the local setProcessGroup(cmd) after each exec.Command call."}

Fixed in commit 80e5fc3 — all standalone git and doltserver exec.Command calls now have SetProcessGroup

All 7 sub-tasks completed. 173+ exec.Command calls across git, beads, daemon, refinery, doltserver, deacon, polecat, tui, and other background packages now have SetProcessGroup/CREATE_NO_WINDOW. Commits: 958f5ef, 0dd2877, 457421a, fb28a1d, 80e5fc3.
Fixed by epic gt-th7: all exec.Command calls now have SetProcessGroup/CREATE_NO_WINDOW

old_value: {"id":"gt-2om","title":"Fix hardcoded export syntax for Windows compatibility","description":"Multiple Go files bypass the OS-aware helpers (config.ExportPrefix, config.PrependEnv) and hardcode bash export VAR=value syntax, which breaks on Windows PowerShell. Files: handoff.go (builds exports[] manually), quota/executor.go, cmd/quota.go, cmd/rig_detect.go, cmd/role.go, cmd/worktree.go, hooks/config.go (pathSetup). Each needs to either use the existing helpers or add runtime.GOOS checks.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"costin.eseanu@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-25T00:01:11Z","created_by":"mayor","updated_at":"2026-03-25T00:01:11Z"}
